name: Mushrooms Stuffed with Spinach and Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Rinse and dry mushrooms thoroughly.
3. Finely chop the mushroom stems and set aside.
4. Coat the mushroom caps with a mixture of oil, 2 teaspoons lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
5. Arrange the coated mushroom caps on a baking pan, stem side down, and bake for 5 minutes.
6. Remove spinach stems from spinach leaves and rinse/drain them.
7. Heat butter in a saucepan, add onions, and cook until wilted.
8. Add mushroom stems and 1 teaspoon lemon juice to the saucepan; stir briefly.
9. Add spinach and cook until most of the liquid is evaporated.
10. Stir in whipping cream, nutmeg, salt, pepper, egg (cook for about 10 seconds), prosciutto, and parmesan cheese.
11. Fill mushroom caps with the mixture and sprinkle with cheese.
12. Bake for ten to fifteen minutes.
